name: Frances Wayne
abstract: Frances Wayne (born Chiarina Francesca Bertocci or Clara Bertocci, August 26, 1919 – February 6, 1978) was an American jazz vocalist. She was best known for her recording of "Happiness Is Just a Thing Called Joe."

concerts.label: Carnegie Pop Concert: Jazz at the Philharmonic

about_quotes.speaker: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral
about_quotes.evidence: I happened to have loved that song because hearing Frances Wayne sing it with Woody Herman’s band
about_quotes.doc_title: Jackie Cain and Roy Kral interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, March 22, 1998
